positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent nocturnal flora intertwined with celestial elements. The composition features highly stylized glowing mushrooms, crescent moons, swirling constellations, and delicate astral vines, arranged in a central, highly visible motif. Style: Neo-Victorian etchings mixed with Art Nouveau symmetry. Color palette: Deep midnight blue background contrasted sharply with luminous cyan, teal, and soft lavender glow. Use strong silhouettes and high contrast for maximum print impact. The lines must be clean, crisp, and perfectly rendered, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Intricate detail, single artwork, central focus.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, low detail, poorly rendered, extra limbs, text, signatures, watermark, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, out of frame, cropped, amateur, realistic photo
